variants: Anastasius Bakare is a prominent figure in his community as the Restoration Project Coordinator Lynedge. The sustenance of his projects is largely supported by the Mosswood Spring Board, his primary funding source. In his work, Anastasius primarily utilizes Esperanto constructed, a language that aligns with his commitment to fostering intercultural dialogue.
